llmResponse.agenda_changes: Two HR action items moved from Action Items section to Consent Items: Item 8.3 (Local Interagency Agreement for Education Training) and Item 8.4 (Approval of Personnel Changes). Item 11.1 (Correspondence) moved to immediately after Oral Communication.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll make a motion to approve second. All in favor? Aye.
